def logging_middleware(request, next):
    start = time.time()
    response = next(request)
    print(f"{request.method} {request.path} {time.time()-start:.3f}s")
    return response

conversations.content: Create a logger.py module with basic file logging

args.content:
import logging

def setup_logger(name, log_file="app.log"):
    logger = logging.getLogger(name)
    logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
    handler = logging.FileHandler(log_file)
    handler.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(message)s"))
    logger.addHandler(handler)
    return logger
